name: Fajita Pizza
recipeIngredient: Green bell pepper (1 medium), cut into thin rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Move oven rack to the lowest position and preheat the oven to 475°F.
2. Cut chicken into strips, about 1/8- to 1/4-inch thick.
3. Heat a 10-inch skillet until hot enough that 1 or 2 drops of water bubble and skitter when sprinkled in.
4. Add oil and rotate pan to coat the inside.
5. Add chicken; cook and stir for 3 minutes.
6. Add pepper and onion; cook and stir for 3 to 4 minutes until vegetables are crisp tender.
7. Remove from heat and stir in salsa.
8. Prepare pizza crust (see below).
9. Sprinkle 3/4 cup of cheese over the crust.
10. Top with chicken mixture.
11. Sprinkle remaining cheese on top.
12. Bake at 475°F for 12 to 15 minutes, or until the crust is brown and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Pizza Crust
- Biscuit baking mix (1 1/2 cups)
- Hot water (1/3 cup)
1. Mix biscuit baking mix and hot water; beat vigorously for 20 strokes.
2. Turn dough onto a surface well dusted with baking mix or flour.
3. Knead about 60 times, or until smooth and no longer sticky.
4. Dust hands with baking mix or flour.
5. Press dough into a 13-inch circle on a cookie sheet or press into a pizza pan; pinch the edge to form a 1/2-inch rim.
